description: For warm summer evenings, this is the perfect choice from catwalk. The rainbow coloured straps match the vibrancy of the sunshine and if you feel like colour blocking, pick up this piece before stocks run out! Upper Colourful leather upper in a thong style for extra comfort Leather backing on the straps for added comfort Wooden footbed with embossed branding for durability and style Outsole TPU outsole in a flexible design for greater flexibility of the feet Grainy pattern on the forefoot Circular lug on the heel shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
